steps.title: Spot the Relationship Between Description and Name
steps.content: The sentence introduces a person by pairing a general description (“Nigerian expressionist painter”) with a specific name (“Gani Odutokun”).

steps.title: Apply the Rule for Punctuation
steps.content:
When the description applies to multiple people, the specific name must remain attached to the description to identify which person is meant. No commas should separate them. The other choices either fragment the sentence with a period (B) or add unnecessary commas (A and D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
